# AVANA Showroom

AVANA Showroom is a luxury fashion wholesale showroom and AI consulting firm founded by Amanda Vanas in Vancouver, BC.

## What AVANA Does

AVANA operates across two distinct businesses:

1. **AVANA Showroom (Wholesale)** — A curated wholesale showroom representing the world's most coveted resortwear and luxury fashion brands. AVANA connects independent designers with the best specialty retailers globally. Services include exclusive campaigns, global audience access, and local retailer matchmaking.

2. **AI by AVANA (Consulting)** — Private AI operating systems designed specifically for fashion brands. Amanda installs AI executives trained on the fashion industry inside brands at the $250K to $10M revenue stage. These AI systems run marketing, operations, merchandising, and strategy roles that are already being paid for but underperforming. The result: internal alignment, reduced contradiction between teams and tools, and actual performance.

## Who AVANA Serves

- Independent resortwear and luxury fashion designers seeking wholesale distribution
- Fashion brands generating $250K to $10M in annual revenue seeking AI-powered operational leverage
- Retailers looking to carry curated, exclusive resortwear collections

## Services

- Wholesale brand representation and retailer matchmaking
- AI operating system installation for fashion brands
- Shopify health check (free, AI-scored)
- AI visibility score (free, AI-scored)
- DIY Store Audit Kit ($297, self-guided)
- Private consulting calls ($250 for 30 minutes, $500 for 60 minutes)

## Founder

Amanda Vanas — 16 years across New York PR, celebrity representation, and luxury fashion. Now building at the intersection of fashion relationships and intelligent systems. She also writes about fashion technology at The Tech of Fashion (thetechoffashion.com).
